seoTitle: Runic News & Updates | Product Releases & Events | LiTong Distributor
seoDescription: Latest news from Runic including new product releases, technology updates, and industry events. Stay informed about analog and mixed-signal innovations.

faqs.question: Where can I find the latest Runic product announcements?
faqs.answer: Latest Runic product announcements are available through: (1) This news page - regularly updated with new releases; (2) LiTong newsletter - subscribe for email updates; (3) Product pages - show latest releases; (4) Technical support - contact FAE for roadmap info. As an authorized distributor, LiTong receives advance notice of new products.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to LiTong's newsletter and check this page regularly for updates.

faqs.question: How do I get notified about Runic events and webinars?
faqs.answer: Stay informed about Runic events through: (1) LiTong events page - upcoming webinars and seminars; (2) Email notifications - subscribe to event alerts; (3) Technical seminars - regional training on Runic products; (4) Online webinars - virtual training sessions. LiTong hosts technical seminars featuring Runic analog design topics.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to LiTong's event notifications for invitations to Runic technical seminars.

articles.title: Runic Releases RS8xx Zero-Drift Op-Amp Series
articles.summary: New RS8xx series delivers 5μV max offset voltage with auto-zero calibration, competing with industry leaders at significantly lower cost.
content: Runic has announced the release of its RS8xx series zero-drift operational amplifiers, featuring industry-leading 5μV maximum offset voltage.
The RS8xx series uses advanced auto-zero calibration technology to achieve:
The series includes single (RS8551), dual (RS8552), and quad (RS8554) configurations in industry-standard packages. Pin-compatible with OPA189 and ADA4522.
Samples and evaluation boards are available through LiTong.
highlights: Available in single, dual, and quad configurations

articles.title: Runic Expands AEC-Q100 Automotive Portfolio
articles.summary: New automotive-grade op-amps, voltage references, and supervisors qualified to AEC-Q100 Grade 1 for -40°C to +125°C operation.
content: Runic has expanded its automotive-grade product portfolio with new AEC-Q100 qualified devices for automotive electronics applications.
All products are qualified to AEC-Q100 Grade 1 (-40°C to +125°C) and include PPAP documentation support.
Applications include battery management, sensor interfaces, and body electronics.
highlights: Cost-effective alternatives to automotive-grade international parts

articles.title: Runic Introduces RS6xx High-Speed Op-Amp Series
articles.summary: New RS6xx series offers 50MHz GBW and 30V/μs slew rate for active filters, ADC drivers, and high-speed signal conditioning.
content: Runic has launched the RS6xx series high-speed operational amplifiers, designed for applications requiring fast settling and wide bandwidth.
The RS6331 (single) and RS6332 (dual) are pin-compatible with OPA354 and AD8034, offering cost-effective alternatives for high-speed designs.
Ideal for active filters, ADC drivers, and video applications.
highlights: Cost-effective alternative to high-speed international parts

articles.title: Runic Expands Data Converter Portfolio with 16-bit ADCs
articles.summary: New RS1240 and RS1241 16-bit SAR ADCs offer 100ksps sampling with low power consumption for industrial and medical applications.
content: Runic has expanded its data converter portfolio with the introduction of 16-bit precision ADCs for measurement and data acquisition applications.
RS1240 is pin-compatible with ADS1115, while RS1241 offers higher speed. Both include internal reference and programmable gain amplifier.

articles.title: LiTong Becomes Authorized Runic Distributor
articles.summary: LiTong expands analog portfolio with Runic products, providing local inventory and technical support for precision analog ICs.
content: LiTong is pleased to announce a distribution partnership with Runic Technology, adding precision analog and mixed-signal ICs to our product portfolio.
As an authorized Runic distributor, LiTong provides:
- Full product line of op-amps, ADCs, DACs, and power management
- Comprehensive technical support from analog FAEs
- Application engineering and design review services
This partnership strengthens LiTong's analog offering and provides customers with cost-effective alternatives to international brands.
